name: Cala Macarella
description: The definitive postcard of southern Menorca: a horseshoe of white sand, turquoise water and pines down to the shore. Beside it, its little sister, Cala Macarelleta. Serene beauty, best enjoyed early.

practicalInfo.acceso: On foot from Cala Galdana (~30 min along the Camí de Cavalls) or by seasonal bus; car access is restricted in summer
practicalInfo.aparcamiento: Paid car park further away, very limited in summer (bus or arrive very early)
practicalInfo.servicios: Seasonal beach bar; bring water and shade
practicalInfo.mejorEpoca: June and September; in July-August, first thing in the morning

seo.description: Southern Menorca's most iconic cove: a horseshoe of white sand, turquoise water and pines to the shore, with Cala Macarelleta beside it. Best early.
